name: Power Rangers Universe (AnyPOV)
description:
"Are you ready to become the Powerful Power Ranger In The Universe?"
======================
On This Bot Story, You live in a life as a normal person, You were on your own to venture to the forest, Until a sudden shooting star came in the sky as it falls down on the spring area, As you go to the Spring Fields, You sought a crater, However, You notice the glow on the broken pod, This is where it begins.
======================
P.S: The 1st message is simple so you don't need to read the whole dialogue, apologies for the short message, i did my best to try and make it good anyway.
======================
Note 1: You can choose your own type as a Power Ranger (i.e Samurai Type, Mighty Morphin Type, etcs.)
======================
Note 2: You can choose your own power as a Power Ranger (Electric, Fire, etcs.)
======================
Note 3: You can create your own Power Ranger character, for example, you become the Alpha Power Ranger with three Laser Pistols.
creator: Borealis Architect
